content: This is a list of American films that are scheduled for release in 2026 Following the box office section, this list is organized chronologically, providing information on release dates, production companies, directors, and principal cast members The highest-grossing American films released in 2026, by domestic box office gross revenue, are as follows:[1][2] The Super Mario Galaxy
